explanation: I selected the tax year for the income report.

I chose pension as the income source for this path.
The income source is set, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected an increase so the new amount should be higher than before.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the higher new monthly amount for the increase route.
The amount is complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose email as the initial contact method.
I entered the initial email address for contact.
The email contact details are complete, so I am moving to notes.
I added a short note so the first review page has complete details.
The initial route is complete, so I am moving to check answers.
I followed the contact-method change link so I can update how follow-up contact works.
I switched the contact method to text message.
I entered the mobile number required by the changed contact method.
The updated contact details are complete, so I am moving through notes back to the review page.
The notes page does not need changes, so I am returning to check answers to verify the new contact details.
